name: Journeys End A New Beginning v2

reviews.review_description:
Thank you for trying this out. This is my first game. I am currently working on a new version with lots of updates. 
Here's how this game works. *( When you enter the game, find the batteries located but the power units. They will open portals, next grab the blue crystal, and place it on the table in front of the glowing circle. If you put it in, the machine will consume it.  When you press the button, you will have an unlimited gun by the ammo chest. Finally, if you press the red button, well, good luck.

This game is a little bit poorly made but I understand that this is an alpha and won’t look good until finished. If the creator is reading this then I can help if you want to. If you wanna contact me my discord is @redout0940
